base_includes: Seamless 5" K-style aluminum gutter, machine-formed on site (.027 gauge)
base_excludes: Fascia / soffit repair or replacement — billed separately
_meta.notes: All-in $14.00/LF × gutter run (≈ eave_lf) is the customer-facing price; standard downspouts are bundled in. Itemized lines below show what's included (unit_price 0 = bundled). Real $-amounts live in add_ons. Prices are editable starting points — adjust per your market.

items.description: 5" K-style seamless aluminum gutter, installed — hidden hangers @ 24" OC, miters, end caps, sealant. All-in incl. standard downspouts.
items.notes: All-in billing line: $14.00/LF × gutter run (eave_lf). Downspouts bundled.

items.description: Standard 2"x3" downspouts with elbows and drops — count sized to gutter run
Tear-off and haul-away of existing gutters + downspouts

add_ons.description: Upgrade to 6" oversized K-style aluminum (high-flow) — additive over 5"
Gutter guard / leaf protection — micro-mesh, installed
Upgrade to copper half-round gutter (in lieu of aluminum)
add_ons.notes: Substitutes for the aluminum base — premium.

add_ons.description: Additional downspout beyond standard count (full drop + elbows)
add_ons.notes: For long runs or extra drainage points.
Additive per downspout for 2+ story runs.

add_ons.description: Rotted fascia board replacement (1x6 primed pine)
add_ons.notes: Allowance — actual qty determined on tear-off.

warranty_disclosure: Seamless aluminum gutters carry a standard contractor workmanship warranty. Material finish (baked-enamel aluminum) carries the manufacturer's finish warranty. Copper and 6" upgrades are quoted as add-ons.
